tactical_shape: Notional 3-4-2-1 often resembling a 5-4-1 with two deep banks
Deep defensive block, compact and difficult to play through
Looked to weather pressure and counter through possession
standout_players: Eldor Shomurodov did a lot of chasing
Abbosbek Fayzullaev scored a close-range equaliser
Utkir Yusupov was beaten for Colombia's winner
home_read.momentum: Stayed in the game until the end, but the punditry suggests beating stronger sides will be difficult despite their resilience.

tactical_shape: Controlled most of the game through midfield, with Jefferson Lerma a controlling figure
Created the opener via Luis Díaz and Daniel Muñoz from the right
Dropped deep after retaking the lead, inviting Uzbekistan pressure
standout_players: Luis Díaz: goal and assist, man of the match
Jefferson Lerma: key figure in midfield, controlling Colombia's domination
Camilo Vargas: made a crucial save/deflection involvement on Uzbekistan's equaliser
Gustavo Puerta: laid on Díaz for the winner
Jaminton Campaz: headed in the late clincher
Juan Camilo Hernández: tenacious work for the third goal
away_read.momentum: A winning start and group control, but the punditry says they still need to sharpen their finishing and chance creation against more proactive opponents.
